ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot delicately holding a notepad.  The robot will initially hold the notepad with both arms, then transition to holding it with one, and finally return to a neutral position. This conveys a sense of careful handling and attention to the notepad.  The robot does not have hands, so the arms will be positioned to imply holding the notepad in a gentle manner.

frames.beat: both arms cradle the notepad gently
the right arm moves to firmly grasp the notepad
the left arm releases, right arm holds steady
